---
pagetitle: "Research | Jubayer Hossain"
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
comments: false
---

::: {.research-hero-container}
::: {.research-hero-section}
# Research <span class="hero-accent">Portfolio</span>
:::
::: {.research-subtitle}
Advancing biomedical research through AI-driven approaches to solve complex health challenges and improve patient outcomes.
:::
:::

::: {.main-content}

::: {.research-areas-section}
## Research Areas

::: {.research-areas-grid}
::: {.research-area-card}
::: {.research-icon}
🧠
:::
::: {.research-content}
### Neuroepidemiology & Brain Health
Investigating the epidemiology of neurological disorders using computational approaches. Focus on population-based studies, risk factor identification, and predictive modeling for neurodegenerative diseases.
:::
:::

::: {.research-area-card}
::: {.research-icon}
🎯
:::
::: {.research-content}
### Cancer Epidemiology & Oncology
Applying machine learning and statistical methods to understand cancer patterns, survival analysis, and treatment outcomes. Development of predictive models for early detection and prognosis.
:::
:::

::: {.research-area-card}
::: {.research-icon}
🧬
:::
::: {.research-content}
### Bioinformatics & Genomics
Computational analysis of genomic data, transcriptomics, and multi-omics integration. Development of algorithms for variant analysis, gene expression profiling, and precision medicine.
:::
:::

::: {.research-area-card}
::: {.research-icon}
🤖
:::
::: {.research-content}
### AI in Drug Discovery
Leveraging artificial intelligence for pharmaceutical research, including molecular design, drug-target interaction prediction, and compound optimization using deep learning approaches.
:::
:::

::: {.research-area-card}
::: {.research-icon}
🏥
:::
::: {.research-content}
### Public Health Informatics
Application of data science methods to public health challenges, including disease surveillance, health policy analysis, and environmental health impact assessment.
:::
:::

::: {.research-area-card}
::: {.research-icon}
🔬
:::
::: {.research-content}
### Computational Biology
Development of computational methods for biological data analysis, including phylogenetics, protein structure prediction, and systems biology approaches.
:::
:::
:::
:::

## Current Projects

<div class="projects-grid">
<div class="project-card active">
<div class="project-status">Active</div>
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Secondhand Smoke Exposure Assessment</h3>
<p><strong>Funding:</strong> Tobacco Control Policy Research Grant Program ($10,000)<br>
<strong>Duration:</strong> 2024 - Present<br>
<strong>Role:</strong> Principal Investigator</p>
<p>Investigating compliance with smoke-free policies in public spaces across Bangladesh. This multi-site study combines observational data collection with policy analysis to assess the effectiveness of tobacco control measures.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
- Public Health
- Policy Research
- Environmental Health
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card active">
<div class="project-status">Active</div>
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Deep Learning for Breast Cancer Detection</h3>
<p><strong>Funding:</strong> Research and Innovation Center ($2,730)<br>
<strong>Duration:</strong> 2024 - Present<br>
<strong>Role:</strong> Principal Investigator</p>
<p>Development of an AI-powered early detection system for breast cancer using deep learning algorithms. The project focuses on improving diagnostic accuracy and reducing false positive rates in mammography screening.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
- Deep Learning
- Medical Imaging
- Cancer Research
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card active">
<div class="project-status">Active</div>
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Air Quality Impact on Asthma Prevalence</h3>
<p><strong>Funding:</strong> International Center for Climate Change and Development ($4,550)<br>
<strong>Duration:</strong> 2024 - Present<br>
<strong>Role:</strong> Principal Investigator</p>
<p>Comprehensive study examining the relationship between air quality metrics and asthma prevalence in urban areas of Bangladesh. Integrating environmental monitoring data with health surveillance systems.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
- Environmental Health
- Climate Change
- Respiratory Disease
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card active">
<div class="project-status">Active</div>
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Climate-Related Health Surveillance System</h3>
<p><strong>Funding:</strong> Global Disaster Preparedness Center ($4,550)<br>
<strong>Duration:</strong> 2024 - Present<br>
<strong>Role:</strong> Principal Investigator</p>
<p>Development of early warning systems for climate-related health threats including waterborne diseases and heat-related illnesses. Focus on vulnerable populations in flood and drought-prone regions.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
- Climate Health
- Disease Surveillance
- Early Warning Systems
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<div class="project-status">Completed</div>
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Deep Learning Framework for Neuroimaging</h3>
<p><strong>Duration:</strong> 2023 - 2024<br>
<strong>Role:</strong> Lead Researcher</p>
<p>Developed innovative deep learning approaches for neuroimaging analysis, focusing on artifact removal, image quality enhancement, and diagnostic prediction for neurological disorders.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
- Neuroimaging
- Deep Learning
- Medical AI
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="project-card">
<div class="project-status">Completed</div>
<div class="project-content">
<h3>Genomic Data Analysis Pipeline</h3>
<p><strong>Duration:</strong> 2022 - 2023<br>
<strong>Role:</strong> Principal Investigator</p>
<p>Created comprehensive bioinformatics pipeline for genomic variant analysis and interpretation, with applications in precision medicine and population genetics studies.</p>
<div class="project-tags">
- Genomics
- Bioinformatics
- Precision Medicine
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>

::: {.research-metrics-section}
## Research Impact

::: {.metrics-grid}
::: {.metric-card}
::: {.metric-number}
$25,400+
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Total Research Funding
:::
:::

::: {.metric-card}
::: {.metric-number}
15+
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Research Projects
:::
:::

::: {.metric-card}
::: {.metric-number}
8+
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Collaborating Institutions
:::
:::

::: {.metric-card}
::: {.metric-number}
6
:::
::: {.metric-label}
Research Areas
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::
